response: {"action": "sql", "sql": "SELECT (SELECT SUM(tot_sls_amt) FROM dly_sls_agg) AS dly_sls_agg_total, (SELECT SUM(tot_amt) FROM ord_hdr WHERE sts_cd <> 'X') AS ord_hdr_non_cancelled_total, (SELECT SUM(tot_sls_amt) FROM dly_sls_agg) - (SELECT SUM(tot_amt) FROM ord_hdr WHERE sts_cd <> 'X') AS difference", "reason": null}
